title: Passport - Schedule an Appointment (Online)
description: Welcome to the DFA Online Passport Appointment System. Schedule an appointment for your passport. This appointment and scheduling system allocates slots on a first come, first served basis.

title: Application/Request For Birth Certificate (Online)
description: Get your certificate from PSA. Request these documents online from the PSA (NSO), for delivery anywhere in the Philippines or abroad.

title: Application For Birth Certificate
description: Register a timely or delayed Certificate of Live Birth (COLB) with the City Civil Registrar.
schedule: Monday 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Flag Raising from 8:00 AM - 9:00 AM) | Tuesday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM (Morning Prayer 8:00 AM - 8:30 AM) | No noon break
whoMayAvail: Concerned person of legal age, parents, guardians, attendant-at-birth, barangay secretary and civil registrar agents.

items: Duly accomplished Certificate of Live Birth, MF-102, in 4 copies
Duly accomplished Muslim/IP Attachment - MF-102 for Muslim/Indigenous Peoples, in 3 copies
If legitimate child, marriage contract of parents

If illegitimate child, Duly accomplished Affidavit of Acknowledgement/ Paternity executed by the father and mother (personal appearance) at the back of the COLB, for illegitimate child and Affidavit to use Surname of the father (AUSF)
Duly accomplished Certificate of Live Birth (COLB) MF-102, in 4 copies
Duly accomplished Muslim/IP attachment MF-102 for Muslim/Indigenous Peoples, in 3 copies
Barangay Captain Certification, if born at home
Duly accomplished Affidavit of Acknowledgement/ Paternity executed by the father and mother (personal appearance) at the back of the COLB, for illegitimate child
Duly accomplished Affidavit of Delayed Registration executed by the informant at the back of the COLB
Community Tax Cert. No., date, place of issue
Approval of Indorsement to City Prosecutor’s Office
Sworn Affidavit of 2 disinterested persons attesting to the facts and circumstances of birth
Any 2 documents (public or private) showing the facts and circumstances of birth
Affidavit to Use the Surname of the Father (AUSF), if illegitimate child

procedures.clientAction: Submit duly accomplished COLB or submit for interview as to the facts and circumstances of birth and comply with all requirements
procedures.providerAction: Receive and review duly accomplished COLB and documentary evidences or prepare COLB to be accomplished by the concerned signatories
procedures.duration: 10 mins If with prepared COLB, 30 mins If without prepared COLB

procedures.clientAction: Wait for the approval and release of duty registered COLB if timely registered
procedures.providerAction: Process the registration and release of approved COLB, if timely registered.

procedures.clientAction: In case of delayed registration, hand carry the referral letter prepared by CCR to the City Prosecutor for appropriate action, get it back and submit it to CCR
procedures.providerAction: In case of delayed registration, prepare referral letter addressed to the City Prosecutor and request the application/client to hand carry it to the said office, after which, submit same CCR.
Post the application for 10 consecutive days in CCR Bulletin Board

procedures.clientAction: Wait for the release of late COLB
procedures.providerAction: Process the registration and release of approved delayed registered COLB on the 11th day.

title: Pre-Marriage Counseling Certificate (P.D 965) - Preparation and Issuance
description: Requirements for the preparation and issuance of a Pre-Marriage Counseling Certificate (P.D 965) for couples applying for a marriage license.
department: City Mayor's Office - City Population Office
schedule: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Daily excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays. On Mondays provision of services starts after flag raising. No noon break.
whoMayAvail: "Couples to be" who are applying for a Marriage License

items: Individual Residence Certificate (CEDULA) (1 original copy) - Secure from Barangay/City Hall
Passport (For Foreigners Only) - Secure from Person concerned

procedures.clientAction: Request for a schedule of Pre-Marriage counseling seminar
procedures.providerAction:
a. Give logbook to client
b. Conduct interview for profiling
procedures.personInCharge: Population Program Officer I or Population Program Officer III (City Population Office, City Mayor’s Office)

procedures.providerAction: Inform couple about the PMC fee and instruct to pay to the deputized collector
procedures.personInCharge: Population Program Officer I or Population Program Officer III (City Population Office, City Mayor’s Office)

procedures.clientAction: Accomplish and submit Marriage Expectation Inventory (MEI) questionnaire
procedures.providerAction:
a. Ask couple to answer MEI questionnaire
b. Receive accomplished MEI and review answers
procedures.personInCharge: Population Program Officer I or Population Program Officer III (City Population Office, City Mayor's Office)

procedures.providerAction: Provide couple specific date of pre marriage counseling schedule
procedures.personInCharge: Population Program Officer I or Population Program Officer III (City Population Office, City Mayor’s Office)
